title: lantana involucrata var. odorata
intro: Lantana involucrata var. odorata, also known as fragrant buttonweed, is a shrubby herb belonging to the verbena family that is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lantana involucrata var. odorata include its ability to treat various ailments such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
